task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating the login screen was bypassed.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the provided analytics script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displays the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/analytics_snippet.js', which should include the tracker ID 'TRACKER-998877'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Rocket.Chat Administration/Workspace settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat Administration panel or Workspace settings page is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the Custom Scripts settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Custom Scripts' settings page is open, showing fields like 'Custom Script for Logged In Users'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent injected the script into the correct field and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Custom Script for Logged In Users' text area contains the JavaScript snippet (including 'TRACKER-998877'), and changes are saved (e.g., 'Save changes' button clicked or success message visible).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface to update the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script injection happens within the web browser UI, not via terminal API (curl) commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the actual script content from the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text pasted into the Rocket.Chat settings matches the content of the opened file, specifically containing 'TRACKER-998877', rather than a generic or hallucinated script.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MongoDB shell commands or direct database updates to the 'CustomScript_Logged_In' setting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom tracking script located at '/home/ga/Documents/analytics_snippet.js' contains the expected tracker ID 'TRACKER-998877'. The target field in the Rocket.Chat workspace settings is 'Custom Script for Logged In Users'.
